title: Hormone Function
definition: The mechanisms by which hormones control various bodily functions.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A communication system inside our bodies that helps regulate different processes like metabolism, growth, and reproduction using chemical messengers called hormones.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The role of hormones in transmitting signals between cells to maintain homeostasis and control various physiological functions.
difficulty_levels.expert: Intricate network of chemical messengers secreted by endocrine glands, traveling through the bloodstream to target organs, which regulate a myriad of biological processes such as growth, development, metabolism, and behavior, in addition to their profound implications for disease pathogenesis and drug therapy.

extra_fields.insight: The symphony orchestrated by hormones within our bodies.
